forceScanTooltip: Scan the root object hierarchy for materials
noMaterials: No materials found. Drop a GameObject in the Root Object field and scan again.
rescanTexturesTooltip: Scan the root object hierarchy for textures
noTextures: No textures found. Drop a GameObject or Material in the Root Object field and scan again.
noRootObject: Drop a GameObject or Material in the Root Object field above to begin.
inspectSelectedTooltip: Switch to Texture Mode for selected materials
cloneSelectedTooltip: Clone selected items as new assets
replaceSelectedTooltip: Replace selected items with the batch target
resetSelectedTooltip: Reset selected items to their originals
bseNoSMR: Assign an Avatar Root and a SkinnedMeshRenderer above to begin.
bseNoAnimatorMsg: The selected GameObject has no Animator. Animation paths may be incorrect. Continue anyway?
bseSMRNotInRoot: The SkinnedMeshRenderer must be a child of the Avatar Root.
bseResetDefaultConfirm: Reset all blendshapes to the values they had when the renderer was first assigned?
bseNoneMatched: No blendshapes match the current filter.
bseExportSaveMsg: Select a location to save the animation.
bseExportNothing: No blendshapes match the current export mode.
bseImportOverlayDesc: Keep existing values; only overwrite blendshapes present in the clip.
bseImportResetZeroDesc: Set all blendshapes to 0, then apply the clip.
bseImportResetDefaultDesc: Reset to default (scan-time) values, then apply the clip.
bseImportCustomDesc: Choose which source blendshapes to import.
scNoControllerHelp: No Scene Controller found in the loaded scenes. Click Create to add one.
scStubInfo: The Controller UI lives in its own window so the Inspector stays free.
scAvatarHelp: Drop a GameObject with an Animator into the Avatar field above.
scNoAvatarWarning: No avatar assigned. Assign an avatar above to access Avatar, Play Mode Input, and Camera settings.
scInputHelp: Hold Right-Click to look around. WASD / QE move the camera (Free-Fly, RMB held) or move the avatar (no RMB / Orbit). Hold Shift in Free-Fly for 2× speed. Scroll wheel zooms distance in Orbit.
scCamModeCustomInfo: Custom cameras always use Free-Fly (right-click + WASD/QE).
scSceneDisabledHint: Scene settings are disabled. Click Enable to apply recommended defaults (grey color skybox, linear fog, directional light, debug floor, Basic post-processing). A snapshot is taken so you can revert.
scDirNoUserPresets: No user presets. Built-ins cannot be removed.
scPpMissingHelp: Post Processing package is not installed. Click below to install com.unity.postprocessing.
scPpMissingMsg: Post Processing package is required for the Post Processing section. Install com.unity.postprocessing now?
scScanIntro: These Cameras exist in your scene and may interfere with Scene Controller. Disable them now?
scScanLightsIntro: These Lights exist in your scene outside any avatar. Disable them so Scene Controller's lighting rig isn't overpowered?
scReflNoCubes: No Cubemaps found in Packages/com.yank.avatartoolbox/Runtime/Cubemaps. Drop HDRIs in that folder and set their Texture Shape to Cube.
scAutoRefTip: Auto Reference: automatically find & link the unique humanoid avatar in the scene.
